name: Frozen Peach Sunset
recipeIngredient: 1 whole peach, pitted and sliced, unpeeled
Opt. garnish: fresh mint sprigs, lime wedges or peach slice.
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ice, peach nectar, peach slices, and sweetened lime juice in a blender.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. Pour 1 tablespoon of grenadine syrup into the bottom of each of two 12-ounce glasses.
4. Slowly pour the frozen peach mixture over the grenadine in each glass, allowing it to partially mix and create red streaks up to the top of the glass.
5. Garnish with a sprig of fresh mint, a lime wedge, or a peach slice.
6. Serve immediately. Makes 2 servings.
